name: ddaro
description: ddaro - worktree-based parallel workflow plugin (self-hosted marketplace)

plugins.name: ddaro
plugins.description: Worktree-based parallel workflow for Claude Code sessions. 6-tier worktree classification (main / owned / adopted / protected / unmanaged / external), /ddaro:adopt to bring existing worktrees under management, cwd-safe destructive commands (clear/abandon from main only), size-based merge review, crash-recoverable context logs, and plugin-native protective hooks (0.5.0: registered in hooks/hooks.json, active when ddaro is enabled, modes set via /ddaro:config - never written to .claude/settings.json). /ddaro:start uses a 6-step setup. /ddaro:abandon accepts adopted via --force. Korean triggers: 따로, 병렬로, 분리해서.
